mnemonics.title: Spiral Model Phases
mnemonics.content: RDRR: Requirements, Develop, Review, Repeat (with Risk analysis)

acronyms.expansion: Process Reveals Operational Tangibles Optimizing Team-Yielded Product Evolution

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a nautilus shell with each chamber representing a phase

analogies.analogy: Like building a city - start with essential infrastructure and expand neighborhoods iteratively
